requirements.requirement_text: When the body controller detects a change in the hazard warning switch state, it shall immediately transmit the updated hazard activation status onto the vehicle network.
When the exterior parking lamp state changes between OFF and ON, the body controller shall immediately broadcast the updated exterior lamp state to the network.
When any door (front or rear) transitions between open and closed states, the body controller shall immediately transmit the corresponding door status to the gateway ECU.
When the hood or rear tailgate state changes, the body controller shall immediately publish the updated compartment open status to the gateway ECU.
The engine controller shall periodically transmit the current vehicle speed value on the network based on wheel speed and powertrain calculations.
The engine controller shall periodically transmit the current engine rotational speed value to the gateway and instrument cluster ECUs.
The engine controller shall periodically provide the current accelerator pedal or throttle position value to the gateway ECU.
The engine controller shall periodically transmit the current engine coolant temperature value to support thermal monitoring by other ECUs.
The transmission controller shall periodically transmit the currently engaged gear position to the gateway and instrument cluster ECUs.
When a gear shift operation starts or completes, the transmission controller shall immediately indicate the shift-in-progress status to the gateway ECU.
The transmission controller shall periodically indicate the clutch engagement state to the gateway ECU.
